nasb.text: And Joseph her husband, being a righteous man and not wanting to disgrace her, planned to send her away secretly.

esv.text: And her husband Joseph, being a just man and unwilling to put her to shame, resolved to divorce her quietly.

cnv.text: 她丈夫約瑟是個義人，不願張揚使她受辱，就打算暗中與她解除婚約。

ccb.text: 约瑟是个义人，不愿公开地羞辱她，便决定暗中和她解除婚约。

csbs.text: 她的丈夫约瑟是个义人，不愿意公开羞辱她，想要暗中把她休了。
